value.found_quote: The `/fork` command clones your entire conversation history up to the current turn into a new, independent session.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the `/fork` command under the section "Branching with `/fork`", confirming that it clones the entire conversation history into a new independent session. The page also notes the alias `/branch` and describes the workflow for parallel experimentation. This directly substantiates the claim that `/fork` clones the entire conversation history into a new independent session for safe parallel experimentation. The page presents this as a current, active feature with no deprecation or preview indicators.
